title: Chapter 48
content:
Chapter 48: Cum From First French Kiss

Our lips touched. A soft sensation, like kissing pudding, spread across my lips.

*Slither...*

?!

Something unfamiliar was trying to invade my mouth.

*Slither!*

?!

It was her tongue!

Ana-san’s tongue pushed open my lips and entered my mouth.

Wine overflowed from the gap between our lips and dripped down my chin to my neck.

Ana-san moved her lips, perhaps to keep from spilling more wine.

*Mmmnn...*

Our lips pressed firmly together, then slowly returned to their original shape.

Saliva and wine wet our lips, blurring the outline of our mouths.

The elasticity repeated again and again.

Ana-san’s lips returned to shape faster than mine. Her lips must be softer. They pressed against my firmer lips as if urging them along.

And before I could savor the aftertaste, her tongue forcefully invaded my mouth once more.

*Chupa.*

*Slurp...*

*Slither...*

My tongue reflexively reached out to meet hers. It was an irresistible reaction, like unconsciously licking the dentist’s finger.

The tips of our tongues pushed against each other.

One trying to invade, the other instinctively resisting.

There was a brief moment of balance, then my tongue yielded. Ana-san’s tongue dove deeper and entwined with mine.

*Slosh. Slosh.*

Our tongues mixed the wine inside my mouth, and the alcohol fumes rose into my nose.

Hot!

Soft!

What the hell is this?!

My brain couldn’t process this unknown sensation.

Ana-san’s tongue moved across mine as if stealing the wine back.

*Squish.*

*Slurp.*

*Nupaah.*

Not wanting to lose the wine, my tongue circled over hers and moved sideways as if to reap it. Her tongue pushed upward to stop me, pressing my tongue against the roof of my mouth.

Ah... ah... ahh...

*Thump-thump-thump-thump!*

My heart was pounding so hard it hurt. The sexual excitement combined with difficulty breathing made my heart race faster than ever before. This wasn’t like running a long distance. This wasn’t like having a 39-degree fever.

I realized my hand was empty. At some point, I had dropped the cup I was given.

This was my first time even kissing someone, yet our tongues were already entangled. I had no idea what I was supposed to do.

Auh, aaauh, aah...

For some reason, my perineum felt incredibly ticklish. It was like being brushed with a paintbrush right between my balls and asshole.

I had completely forgotten, but I was still a virgin.

I had put it in someone’s ass, deep into their throat, and licked pussy before, but all of that was just an extension of masturbation...

Since I had never once put it inside a vagina, I was still a virgin.

I had thought kisses were something people who loved each other did, so my heart was also a virgin.

And now, my first kiss had been taken by someone I had just met and barely spoken to.

Wait... wasn’t this basically the beginning of being raped?

Wasn’t this the early stages of rape?

My arms hovered uselessly at my sides, unable to resist.

Even though we were about the same height, up close she had narrow shoulders, a slender body, and smelled sweet. She was just a beautiful older sister.

She had a woman’s body that seemed like it should be easy to push away.

But.

Even though she was forcefully stealing my lips, it felt so good that I started thinking maybe it was fine to lose my virginity like this.

My cock was painfully hard, begging to pour my 950 magic power semen into the woman in front of me.

The wine disappeared from my mouth.

I wasn’t sure whether Ana-san had stolen most of it or if it had overflowed and stained my clothes.

Our lips parted.

*Shlurp...*

A string of saliva connected us, as if reluctant to separate.

"Haa... haa..."

"Fuu... fuu..."

We stared at each other up close, both breathing heavily.

Ana-san’s eyes were so melted it looked like hearts were floating in them.

Her long tongue slipped out from between her lips and licked the wine around her mouth.

So that lewd, wriggling tongue had been inside my mouth, tangling with mine.

If I asked, I could probably kiss her again.

No — even if I didn’t ask, she would probably kiss me again.

If I just let things continue like this, I would lose my virginity in a few minutes.

I want to.

I want to have sex...

If I took even one step forward, my raging cock could pierce her virgin pussy. I could taste the pussy of this extremely lewd self-proclaimed virgin redhead who said it was fine even if it was just for fun.

No, that’s wrong. It’s the opposite.

Her lewd red-haired pussy would eat and savor my cock.

Even so, that might be okay.

Being raped and losing my virginity like this... might actually be acceptable.

I want to cum.

My whole body was turning into a mass of spongy tissue, and I could barely think about anything except ejaculating.

But...

When Ana-san leaned in to kiss me again, I pushed against both her shoulders. They were much thinner, softer, and more delicate than I expected.

My arms were pathetically weak.

In truth, I wanted to stop resisting, kiss her again, and just let it happen.

Because that was what I truly felt, I couldn’t put any strength into my arms.

If we kissed one more time, I would definitely lose my reason and end up having sex with her.

I would forget to check whether this arrogant woman’s asshole was strong or weak, and turn into a machine that endlessly pumped sperm deep into her pussy as she desired.

Even so...

I have a promise I must keep!

There’s no way I can become a sex machine!

"I have to go save an acquaintance. Their life is on the line."

My eros was running wild.

I had to run to save Kemololi.

If I got lost in this slippery, wet sex and woke up the next morning only to find out Kemololi had been killed, I could never forgive myself for that ending.

"Can’t I get an advance on the bounty money?"

"Am I not attractive enough?"

"No, you’re incredibly attractive. Honestly, I do want to have sex with you. But someone I know is really waiting, and I need the money."

"..."

After staring at each other for a few seconds, Ana-san gave in. She must have realized how firm my resolve was.

The melted, heart-filled eyes returned to the fierce gaze of a lioness. But even so, there was a hint of gentleness — like a female lion.

"...I see."

*Squeeze.*

"Ugh!"

Stimulation shot through my crotch. I had forgotten she was still gripping my erect cock.

The kiss had felt that good.

*Spurt... Jurrrr...*

I ejaculated, dirtying Ana-san’s hand.

Unbelievably, I had gotten so excited from just my first kiss that I was already on the verge of cumming.

"Fuh, a, uuuu..."

I could tell this was some of the thickest semen I had released recently.

The final wave of pleasure made my hips buckle.

Ana-san looked down at me with a triumphant expression.

"I didn’t cum, but you did. So I win in terms of sexual prowess."

She was right. It was my loss. I had been one-sidedly raped. If we had continued, my virginity would definitely have been taken.

Ana-san licked the semen off her hand with her long tongue.

"It’s different from a woman. So this is the taste of a man. I’ll have you put it inside my belly someday."

With a lewd smile that didn’t suit a virgin, Ana-san placed her hands on her hips.

Before I could wonder what she was doing—

*Fwish.*

She lifted her skirt.

There was no red jungle.

It looked like she had shaved it. The angle was bad, so I couldn’t see her honey pot.

But—

*Drip...*

A single clear strand of liquid dripped from between her legs, carrying a sweet fragrance.

"This is the finest nectar you missed out on. I got more excited than I expected."

Ana-san turned around, swaying her shapely ass, and walked to a chest at the edge of the tent. She took out a leather pouch.

Did she just say "It’s different from a woman. So this is the taste of a man"?

She said that after licking my semen... which means she’s tasted a woman’s love juices before?

She’s a virgin but a technician? Does that mean...?!

"The bounty will be handed over tomorrow, so I can’t give it to you now. Take this instead."

She tossed the pouch to me. I endured the post-ejaculation weakness and caught it.

*Thud...*

It was heavier than it looked. When I loosened the string, I saw it was filled with a large amount of gold coins.

"This is..."

"It’s my money. After tomorrow’s test, make sure you come return it."

"Understood."

I see. She hasn’t given up on recruiting me, so she’s telling me to come again.

I walked to the tent entrance, then turned back inside and bowed my head.

"Thank you very much."

As I was about to leave, there was one thing I wanted to say.

I’m a man too.

It felt a bit uncool to just leave after being almost raped one-sidedly.

So I wanted to leave a cool line as a parting remark.

*(Don’t tell a young woman to fuck you even if it’s just for fun.)*

"Someday I’ll turn that crotch armor into a glass and drink wine mixed with your love juices."

After saying that, I left.

I wonder what kind of expression Ana-san made when I called her a "young woman."

Did hearing "take care of yourself" make her fall for me?
